item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal H5N1 Bird Flu Preparedness
item.description:
👀 H5N1 Bird Flu Preparedness

H5N1 preparedness 119th Congress: stockpile · surveillance · vaccine-development funding · farmworker protections · cooperative-class composing. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 7 (Health Care) · Farm Bill · Agricultural Worker Protections. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
